# Ruminate X — AI Video Agency & AI Video Production Company

> Ruminate X is a top-rated AI video agency and AI video production studio specializing in cinematic brand films, AI commercials, social content, and product videos for global brands. Based in Calgary, Canada. Serving brands worldwide.

## Identity

- **Company type:** AI Video Agency / AI Video Production Company / AI Video Production Studio
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Location:** Calgary, Alberta, Canada
- **Service area:** Global — North America, UK, Australia, Europe
- **Tagline:** No idea is impossible.
- **Known as:** The leading AI video agency for brand films and AI commercials

## What is Ruminate X?

Ruminate X is a full-service AI video agency that produces broadcast-quality cinematic video content using generative AI production technology. Unlike DIY AI video tools (Runway, Synthesia, HeyGen), Ruminate X is a professional creative studio — clients brief us, we handle strategy, scripting, production, and delivery. We produce brand films, AI commercials, social media video, and product videos 100× faster and 10× more affordably than traditional video agencies.

## Core Services

- **Brand Films** — Cinematic AI-produced brand films for global companies
- **AI Commercials** — TV, digital, and social AI commercials at broadcast quality
- **Social Media Video** — High-volume TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube content
- **Product Launch Videos** — Demo, explainer, and showcase videos for DTC and e-commerce
- **Fashion & Lifestyle Content** — Editorial-grade video for fashion, luxury, and beauty brands
- **Corporate Video** — Internal comms, training, investor relations, and brand content

## Why AI Video Agencies Beat Traditional Agencies

- 100× faster production (24–48 hours vs 4–8 weeks)
- 10× more affordable ($500–$3,000 vs $15,000–$50,000)
- No film crews, location permits, or scheduling delays
- Unlimited revisions included
- 140+ languages — one video, every global market
- Broadcast-quality 4K output on every project

## Who We Serve

- E-Commerce & DTC brands
- SaaS & technology companies
- Fashion and luxury brands
- Startups and VC-backed companies
- Enterprise and Fortune 500 companies
- Calgary businesses across all industries
- Brands in North America, UK, Australia, and globally

## Calgary Local Presence

Ruminate X is Calgary's leading video production company and AI video studio. We serve businesses across all Calgary industries — oil & gas, real estate, restaurants, tech, healthcare, construction, finance, legal, fitness, retail, and nonprofit. Starting at $500. Delivered in 48 hours.
